agents.description: Decomposes unstructured natural language into strictly quantitative sub-hypotheses.
Searches SSNR, CORE, arXiv and evaluates abstract relevance to the hypotheses.
Applies sector, liquidity, and sentiment logic to construct an equity universe from given exchanges.
Selects appropriate mathematical models and parameterises the vectorised backtester.
Synthesises numerical results, metrics, and citations into an IMRaD LaTeX report stream.
